title: Bashar quote - circumstances dont matter only state of being matters

transcript.text: This video is what I think about Bashar's
Uh, quote, circumstances don't matter, only state of being matters.
Um, I like it because, um, we, it's kind of like that saying, the harder you climb, the
Farther you fall, like people, if you, you know, people who, a lot of people who live
In poor situations, like, uh, up in the mountains of Nepal or Peru, they don't have electricity
And they live in huts, and they're totally happy, even though they don't have anything.
And then you introduce them things, technology, and then, you know, and then they have these
Little villages of, say, like, uh, you know, the inner city of Delhi or something in the
Ghetto, and then they're not happy anymore because they have more, but they don't have
As much as the people around them.
So then they're unhappy, whereas the people who don't have anything, but they're in their
Own situation, they're happy.
So, um, you can be happy and not have anything.
And we were happy for the longest time, not having anything.

They just draw true on the cave wall and, uh, they were happy.
And so if you, but there's no reason why you shouldn't be unhappy if you lose everything,
